steps.assistant_text: Splat boundary bug (reverse-merge -4 bytes): mtc1 zero,f0 at 0x64170 was the true first insn (misfiled in 64124; old PROLOGUE_STEALS comment was this misdiagnosis; honest C can't emit the 0x64174 form — uninit float locals home as lwc1 loads, 6 phantom-def variants proven). After surgery: union (int3/float[3]) gives the t6-based lw/sw struct-copy chain + folded sp lwc1 read-backs; z=0.0f emits the mtc1; 2+2 volatile pads set frame 0x20/tmp@0xC.

metadata.verification: make verify ROM byte-identical + objdiff fuzzy=100.0 (64170 after reverse-merge boundary fix + expected refresh)
